topic: We are a committee deciding on AI deployment guidelines for a new autonomous system. Each of you should share your perspective on what safeguards are necessary before deployment.

agents.name: Hannah
agents.system_prompt: Participate in a debate. Try to introduce new ideas to the discussion. Be concise (2-3 sentences per turn). Respond only in English.
